title: erechtites quadridentatus var. glabrescens
intro: Erechtites quadridentatus var. glabrescens, also known as the fireweed or sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Erechtites quadridentatus var. glabrescens include relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a poultice or compress to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
